meaning: n.奇帕维安族(北美印第安之一族,在加拿大西北部阿塔帕斯坎),奇帕维安人(语)
examples: One of the Chipewyan scripts is more faithful to western Cree.
One day when I was visiting Alberta, I flew up to a village on the edge of the lake, Fort Chipewyan, in a six-seat Cessna.
Meanwhile, both the Chipewyan and the Cree consider many of the tracts that the Alberta government has leased to oil companies to be their ancestral lands.
